name: io.github.<org-or-user>/inistate-mcp
description: MCP server for the Inistate platform: module discovery, entry management, and activity submission.
title: Inistate MCP

environmentVariables.name: INISTATE_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for Inistate API authentication.

environmentVariables.name: INISTATE_WORKSPACE_ID
environmentVariables.description: Default workspace ID for stateless/remote usage.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Optional auth header for your remote deployment (e.g., Bearer token).
